# criblio_deploy (Resource)

Deploy Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_deploy" "my_deploy" {
  id      = "workers-west"
  version = "6.0.0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Group ID. Requires replacement if changed.
- `version` (String) Requires replacement if changed.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `cloud` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--cloud))
- `description` (String)
- `estimated_ingest_rate` (Number) Estimated ingest rate for the group. Supported values map to Max est ingest rate (MB/s):
  - 1024 -> 12 MB/s
  - 2048 -> 24 MB/s
  - 3072 -> 36 MB/s
  - 4096 -> 48 MB/s
  - 5120 -> 60 MB/s
  - 7168 -> 84 MB/s
  - 10240 -> 120 MB/s
  - 13312 -> 156 MB/s
  - 15360 -> 180 MB/s
- `id` (String)
- `inherits` (String)
- `is_fleet` (Boolean)
- `max_worker_age` (String) This is only configurable for hybrid worker groups.
- `name` (String)
- `on_prem` (Boolean) Whether this is an on-premises group. Cannot be true when cloud is set.
- `provisioned` (Boolean)
- `streamtags` (List of String)
- `tags` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `worker_remote_access` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--items--cloud"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.cloud`

Read-Only:

- `provider` (String)
- `region` (String)
